name: Masscan
description: Asynchronous TCP port scanner capable of scanning the entire IPv4 Internet in minutes. Tool: https://github.com/robertdavidgraham/masscan. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #2 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Masscan output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Masscan output file to parse instead of running it live.
